true_header: Confidentialityagreement
Confidentiality agreement
Background
Operative provisions
Definitions
“ recipient ” means the party receiving confidential information.
“ discloser ” means the party disclosing confidential information to the other party.
“ purpose ” means
Any discussions and negotiations between or within the parties with respect to or in connection with the establishment of a business relationship between the parties;
Any activities in connection with the business relationship between the parties.
Confidential information shall not include information that recipient can demonstrate:
Is at the time of disclosure, or subsequently becomes,
To have had rightfully in its possession prior to disclosure to recipient by discloser;
Is independently developed by recipient without the use of any confidential information; or
Recipient rightfully obtains from a third party who has the right to transfer or disclose it;
Was disclosed to a third party with the discloser's prior written consent; or
Was disclosed to a third party after the period of seven (7)  years from the date of the disclosure.
Non-disclosure and non-use of confidential information
Recipient may disclose confidential information to its subsidiaries without discloser’s consent,
Disclosure to or by a party’s respective subsidiaries shall be considered as disclosure to or by the respective party;
Each party is responsible and liable for its respective subsidiaries’ compliance and due delivery of the obligations set out in this agreement.
For the purposes of this agreement,
Injunctive relief and compensation
In addition and regardless of negligence or fault or proof of an actual damage,
Restrictions and warranty
Recipient (i) shall not disclose confidential information,
Waiver
Assignment
Applicable law & jurisdiction
This agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with austrian law,

Interpretation
Unless inconsistent with the context,
“agreement” means this agreement and all amendments thereof;
“confidential information” means any confidential information,
“disclosing party” means the party disclosing confidential information;
“receiving party” means the party receiving confidential information;
“client” means client name,
Unless inconsistent with the context, an expression which denotes –
Any one gender includes the other gender;
Natural person includes a juristic person, partnership,
The singular includes the plural and vice versa .
Unless specifically otherwise provided,
Where figures are referred to in numerals and in words,
